artPrompt: Two nearly identical human citizens standing shoulder to shoulder on a street corner, one hoisting a blank rectangular placard overhead while the other waves cheerfully at their twin instead of the crowd, matching grins and rumpled sweaters. A single warm streetlamp picks out their faces from one side, casting long mirrored shadows into the brooding dusk behind them. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Sign-Waving Twins
text: When Sign-Waving Twins enters the battlefield, create two 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens.
flavorText: Pat waves the sign. Sam waves at Pat. The recall is, technically, fully staffed.
